page_summary: A page listing large composite numbers with their prime factorizations, accompanied by a tall abstract black silhouette figure on the right side.

decorations.description: A tall, slender abstract black silhouette resembling a stylized vertical humanoid or totem figure, with a small head-like shape at the top and an elongated body tapering down with irregular contours.
decorations.position: right side of the page, spanning nearly the full height
components: small rounded head shape at top
two small protrusions/horns at the upper area
elongated torso with irregular bumps and notches
two small detached black dots/blobs floating to the left of the figure near the middle

uncertain_or_unreadable: Some digits in the very large numbers may be subject to OCR uncertainty, especially the longest products on lines 9, 10, 11, 12, 27, 28, 31, 32.

Line 31 appears to read '3 x 4351757 x 214859738380256640806463955988111 70316033' — the two adjacent large numbers may be a single product or two factors separated by a space that I could not confidently split.
